amount.description: Amount to withdraw in the source currency

target_currency.description: Destination currency (received in the bank account)

rate.description: Desired exchange rate (optional, Ashar provides a rate if omitted)

external_id.description: Client-supplied idempotency key to prevent duplicate withdrawals

beneficiary_id.description: ID of a pre-registered bank account (use this OR the inline fields below)

beneficiary_name.description: Account holder's full name (inline, if no beneficiary_id)

account_type.description: Destination account type: CHECKING or SAVINGS

swift.description: SWIFT/BIC code of the destination bank

requestBody.description: Creates a fiat withdrawal (remittance) order. Debits the virtual balance in source_currency and sends the converted amount to a bank account in target_currency. BRL is sent via PIX, USD via Wire/ACH, and EUR via SEPA. Use beneficiary_id to reference a pre-registered bank account, or provide account details inline.
